name: Cape Charles Town Courts
description: 4 Public pickleball courts with portable nets on 2 tennis courts located at Central Park at the intersection of Peach St. and Madison Ave. Tennis has priority in the mornings, pickleball in the afternoon. Players use TeamReach (group code 12521) to organize play.

name: Randy Custis Memorial Park
description: Randy Custis Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Nassawadox, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Randy Custis Memorial Park Pickleball
description: 6 new dedicated pickleball courts open to the public located in a privately owned park. No lights. Players MUST use Playtime Scheduler to use the courts. No fee required but donations are welcomed.
fees: Private — Free- Open to the public
